page_metadata.biotools__summary: The BCO App is a Shiny app to create, validate, and browse BioCompute Objects. It is a tool for generating BioCompute Objects from next-generation sequencing workflows and computations.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: The BCO App is a Shiny app to create, validate, and browse BioCompute Objects. It is a tool for generating BioCompute Objects from next-generation sequencing workflows and computations.
